GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Swarovski's Holiday collection brings joy and sparkle this festive season", "The magic of Christmas starts here.", "It's nearing the most wonderful time of the year: the festive season! And after a year that has brought much challenge, the world is ready and waiting for a little extra sparkle this holiday season. Enter: heritage Austria-based crystal jewellery, accessories and interiors house, Swarovski. The luxury crystal company has a dazzling 2020 holiday collection to bring exactly the kind of magic to light up our lives this Christmas. Founded in 1895 by Daniel Swarovski, the company is now in its 125th year and continues its family legacy. In celebration of this incredible milestone, this year's Swarovski Holiday collection pays homage to 125 years of timeless, elegant Swarovski craftsmanship. In the 125 years since Swarovski was founded, the company has become renowned for its innovation and bold vision along with its classic craftsmanship and, of course, sparkling, chic crystal-adorned designs that are highly-coveted the world over. This year, bringing a piece of Swarovski into your life or a loved one's life is even more special with the unique designs featured in the house's 125-year celebratory Holiday collection. Is there a more memorable gift to receive or give than a jewellery box with a radiant Swarovski piece inside? With so many stunning options to choose from, a festive gift from the Swarovski Holiday collection is a must add to the Christmas wish-list. For those who love glamour, the Swarovski Sparkling Dance collection awaits. With the unmatched craftsmanship Swarovski is renowned for, along with their unique designs, you'll fall in love with every item from this collection. Covetable items like the fan-shaped Swarovski Sparkling Dance Dial Up earrings for pierced ears in the rose-gold tone plated finish are a holiday season dream. Hoping for a ring to match? The Swarovski Sparkling Dance Dial Up ring is the ideal piece to add to your collection. Link necklaces and bracelets have been a big jewellery trend this year, and any piece from Swarovski's Sparkling Dance North collection will cover this trend in outstanding style. The striking Time range is yet another option for those who want to invest in the link chain trend but prefer to go bolder with a link hoop earring like the Swarovski Time hoop pierced earrings in white with mixed metal finish. Looking to liven up your decor with a festive piece or two? The snowflake-shaped Swarovski annual edition ornament for 2020 is a keepsake that you'll want to have on display all year long. Visit Swarovski.com to view the 2020 Swarovski Holiday collection and add some holiday sparkle to the festive season this year."
